p2p_enrich.notes: Added 3 new repo_tests pass_to_pass gates: (1) test_repo_esbuild_tools_compile - verifies TypeScript files compile with esbuild, (2) test_repo_npm_install_and_eslint - runs npm install and eslint on tools directory, (3) test_repo_check_deps_runs - runs check_deps.js after npm install. CI commands tested: npm install, npx eslint, node utils/check_deps.js, esbuild.

validate.notes: Fixed test_outputs.py with all 8 fail_to_pass and 10 pass_to_pass tests. Fixed eval_manifest.yaml config_edits format.
